query: lens flare halation light leak film photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / chromatic_aberration — halation, light leaks, lo-fi optical color streaks

response.objective_caption: An interior car scene at night photographed from a low angle near the passenger side floor, looking upward at a driver wearing a white t-shirt and shoulder seatbelt. The driver's right hand grips the upper section of the steering wheel. Through the side window and windshield, bright elongated bands of warm white and amber light cut across the dark exterior. The car's ceiling, sun visor, rearview mirror, and overhead controls are visible in the upper portion of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An interior car scene at night photographed from a low, tilted angle near the passenger side floor, looking upward at a driver wearing a white t-shirt and shoulder seatbelt. Intentional motion blur streaks the bright exterior lights into long, dynamic trails across the windshield and side window, softening the driver's face and arm. The driver's right hand grips the upper section of the steering wheel. The unconventional framing emphasizes the car's ceiling, sun visor, rearview mirror, and overhead controls while creating a disorienting, dreamlike sense of speed and movement.
